metadata.description: Baseball Recruiting Tracker — Coaching Change Log

changes.notes: Elliott Avent retired after serving as Head Coach at NC State.
Chris Hart promoted to Head Coach from Associate Head Coach.
Kevin Schnall departed to University of South Carolina as Head Coach.
Chris Lemonis hired as Head Coach. Won 2021 National Championship at Mississippi State.
Matt Williams departed to University of South Carolina as Pitching Coach.
Chad Oxendine departed to University of South Carolina.
Kevin Schnall hired as Head Coach from Coastal Carolina University.
Terry Rooney departed University of South Carolina.
Matt Williams joined from Coastal Carolina University as Pitching Coach.
Bill Cilento joined from Wake Forest University as Hitting Coach.
Bill Cilento departed to University of South Carolina as Hitting Coach.
Rich Dorman departed to University of Florida as Pitching Coach.
Rich Dorman joined from Oregon State University as Pitching Coach.
Monte Lee joined College of Charleston as Associate Head Coach from University of South Carolina.
Jake Gautreau departed East Carolina University.
Taylor Black joined NC State as Recruiting Coordinator from University of South Carolina.
Barry Enright hired as Pitching Coach at Texas A&M.
Chase Lummus hired as Pitching Coach at Lamar University.
Jeff Calhoon hired as Hitting Coach at University of Nebraska Omaha.
Connor Dailey hired as Pitching Coach at New Mexico State University.
Jake Gautreau joined Coastal Carolina as Hitting Coach from East Carolina University.
Matt Reida joined Coastal Carolina as Recruiting Coordinator.
Karsten Whitson departed Florida International University.
Juan Alvarez hired as Pitching Coach at Florida International University.
Travis Fitta hired as Hitting Coach at Grand Canyon University.
Mark Moriarty departed University of Nevada, Reno.
Michael Mendoza joined Western Kentucky as Associate Head Coach from University of New Orleans.
Anthony Izzio joined Jacksonville State as Recruiting Coordinator from Tulane University.
Danny Lynch hired as Hitting Coach at Jacksonville State University.
Brandon Van Horn hired as Hitting Coach at University of Missouri.
Ari Adut joined Saint Mary's as Hitting Coach from Jacksonville State University.
Keith Zuniga joined USC as Pitching Coach from University of Hawaii.
Travis Creel departed University of Southern Mississippi.
Trevor Beerman promoted to Head Coach at Eastern Michigan University.
Rich Witten departed Florida International University after 4 seasons (97-125).
Pedro Grifol hired as Head Coach at Florida International University.
Gregg Wallis departed Grand Canyon University after 4 seasons (112-91).
Steve Bieser hired as Head Coach from Jacksonville State University.
Todd Whitting departed University of Houston after 16 seasons (497-393-1).
Will Davis hired as Head Coach from Lamar University.
Steve Bieser departed Jacksonville State University for Grand Canyon University.
Travis Creel hired as Head Coach from University of Southern Mississippi.
Will Davis departed Lamar University for University of Houston after 10 seasons (283-231).
Sean Allen hired as Head Coach at Lamar University.
Brian Murphy departed Merrimack College after 5 seasons (111-147-2).
Evan Porter departed University of Nebraska Omaha after 10 seasons (194-273-2).
Rob Fournier hired as Head Coach from Western Kentucky University.
Scott Bradley departed Princeton University after 28 seasons (486-658-2).
Jake Hendrick departed Queens University of Charlotte after 3 seasons (38-122).
James Cullinane promoted to Head Coach at Queens University of Charlotte.
Matt Tyner retired from Towson University after 8 seasons (138-298).
Liam Bowen hired as Head Coach from UMBC.
Justin Johnson departed UC Riverside after 6 seasons (81-229).
Max Weir promoted to Head Coach at University of Massachusetts Amherst.
Liam Bowen departed UMBC for Towson University after 7 seasons (144-170).
Danny Acosta departed University of Maryland Eastern Shore after 3 seasons (15-126).
Stan Stolte retired from UNLV after 11 seasons (276-270).
Nick Garritano hired as Head Coach at UNLV.
